title: MCL Medical Consultants Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 53 Posts
short_info: Mahanadi Coalfields (MCL) has released the official Medical Consultants Notification 2026 on the official website, mahanadicoal.in. A total of 53 vacancies have been announced under the MCL Medical Consultants Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 70 years with qualifications such as MBBS, PG Degree, DNB, or PG Diploma in the concerned specialty can apply online up to 11 June 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.age_details: Not more than 70 years of age during the contract period.
age_limit.details: The maximum age limit is 70 years for all posts during the contract period. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, PG Degree/DNB/PG Diploma in concerned specialty for Specialist. MBBS for GDMO.
qualification.details: Consultant (Medical Specialist): MBBS from a recognized Institute/College approved by the Medical Council of India/NMC along with a recognized Post Graduate Degree/DNB/Post Graduate Diploma in the concerned specialty. Retired Medical Executives need minimum "Good" ratings in the last 05 years of service, no punishment under CDA Rules in the last 05 years, and not involved in corruption/illegal gratification/criminal cases. Outside candidates require a minimum of 07 years of experience in the concerned specialization. Consultant (GDMO): MBBS from a recognized Institute/College approved by the Medical Council of India/NMC. Outside candidates should possess a minimum of 03 years of experience as GDMO.

salary_details.pay_scale: Consultant (Medical Specialist): ₹8,000/- per 3-hour session. Consultant (GDMO): ₹5,000/- per day.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the MCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MCL to complete the application.
